en: One, two, three, four, five, six. I gotta think about my head.
ko: 하나, 둘, 셋, 넷, 다섯, 여섯.

en: Seven, eight, nine, ten, eleven, twelve.
ko: 머릿속에 있어, 일곱, 여덟, 아홉, 열, 열하나, 열둘.

en: Sometimes I'll start off with one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten, We're at the head count.
ko: 하나, 둘, 셋, 넷, 다섯, 여섯.

en: Are you expecting more or less? I'm expecting 72.
What if you just miscounted? That's a possibility.
So, were you tempted to have sex with me? Well, I wanted to, but I was too concerned with the missing 72nd.
What's interesting to me is that I find you're focused on the number of women who apparently
ko: 내게 흥미로운 건, 내가 발견한 건,

en: are very interested in you, and yet, Larry, you seem preoccupied.
ko: 그런데, 래리, 너는 신경 쓰고 있는 것 같아.

en: I'm just wondering, have you ever noticed the disparity in these two chairs?
ko: 궁금한 게 있는데, 이 두 의자의 차이를 느껴본 적 있어?

en: Your chair is so much better than this one.
This is not a comfortable chair at all. Did you buy these chairs?
ko: 응, 둘 다 샀어. 네가 둘 다 골랐어? 내가 골랐어, 맞아. 무슨 일이 있었던 거야?

en: Yes, I bought both of them. You picked out both of them? I picked them out, yeah.
ko: 응, 둘 다 샀어. 네가 둘 다 골랐어? 내가 골랐어, 맞아. 무슨 일이 있었어?
